result.stdout:
usage: slnmerge [options] <solutions>...
Copyright (C) 2020-2025 Collin Eggert

  -p, --property        MSBuild property (key=value) when loading projects
  -f, --folder          (Default: slnmerge) Name of solution folder to place
                        merged projects
  -v, --verbosity       (Default: Info) Set verbosity
                        (verbose|info|warning|error|off)
  -u, --undo            (Default: false) Removes ProjectReferences that this
                        tool has added
  --no-restore          (Default: false) Disables restoring nugets while
                        scanning. May not add projects with transitive
                        references
  --help                Display this help screen.
  --version             Display version information.
  solutions (pos. 0)    Required. List of solutions
